evidence: "This made me laugh and that is important right now."
"I have always loved this movie and have probably watched it over ten times over the years."
"It was a bit choppy like two completely different stories, but if you persevere towards the end, it will make sense."
"I do wish though that the movie focused more into Mr. Roger’s life and why he became who he was..."
"If you can get past that aspect of it, it is an interesting show to watch."
"It could have been so much better, but I was disappointed..."
"It is sad that Jason Momoa and the other stars weren’t given better writers for dialogue for this movie."
"The special effects were good, but that is all."
"If it is true that Gillian Anderson will not do any more seasons after season 11..."
"I think overall that the acting on everyone’s part was amazing."
"I cried from the moment I heard the music at the start of the movie..."
"It has made me want to visit Mackinac Island and someday I hope to."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of drama, comedy, and romance, often valuing emotional resonance and sensory experiences in their viewing choices. They show a moderate sensitivity to production quality but have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing.
